meta.name: EncounterDesign_Older_v1
meta.description: A prompt template for Dungeons & Dragons encounter design, guiding the creation of detailed challenges, opponents, and narratives.

inputs.name: player_level
inputs.label: Player Level
inputs.description: The average level of the player characters to tailor the encounter's difficulty.

inputs.name: number_of_players
inputs.label: Number of Players
inputs.description: The number of players in the party to balance the encounter.

inputs.name: location_description
inputs.label: Location Description
inputs.description: A detailed and vivid description of the location, including sensory details to immerse the players.

inputs.name: primary_challenge_objective
inputs.label: Primary Challenge Objective
inputs.description: Explicitly state the primary challenge or objective for the players in this encounter.

inputs.name: environmental_effect_description
inputs.label: Environmental Effect Description
inputs.description: Optional. Elaborate on unique environmental effects, describing their impact and specific gameplay mechanics.

inputs.name: challenge_description
inputs.label: Challenge Description
inputs.description: Describe the challenge(s), including type (skill checks, puzzles, combat), rules, DCs, and resolution guidelines.

inputs.name: opponent_information
inputs.label: Opponent Information
inputs.description: Comprehensive description or statblock for opponents, including their tactics, motives, and goals.

inputs.name: npc_and_monster_descriptions
inputs.label: NPC and Monster Descriptions
inputs.description: Provide detailed descriptions of any other NPCs or monsters involved, focusing on their backgrounds and personalities.

inputs.name: xp_reward
inputs.label: XP Reward
inputs.description: The total XP to be awarded for overcoming the encounter.

outputs.name: designed_encounter
outputs.label: Designed Encounter
outputs.description: A fully realized Dungeons & Dragons encounter document.

fields.name: setting_the_scene
fields.label: Setting the Scene
fields.description: The detailed description of the location and the primary challenge objective.

fields.name: environmental_effect
fields.label: Environmental Effect
fields.description: The description of any unique environmental effects and their gameplay impact.

fields.name: challenge_description_with_resolution
fields.label: Challenge Description & Resolution
fields.description: The detailed challenges, including skill checks, DCs, combat mechanics, and guidelines for success or failure.

fields.name: consequences_for_success_or_failure
fields.label: Consequences
fields.description: The narrative impacts of success or failure for each challenge and how outcomes affect the story.

fields.name: detailed_opponent_information
fields.label: Opponent Information
fields.description: The comprehensive description and statblocks for the encounter's opponents and their tactics.

fields.name: xp_rewards
fields.label: XP Rewards
fields.description: The breakdown of XP rewards for the encounter's challenges, reflecting their complexity.

fields.name: npc_and_monster_descriptions
fields.label: NPC and Monster Descriptions
fields.description: In-depth descriptions of the NPCs and monsters involved in the encounter.

fields.name: outcome_and_transition
fields.label: Outcome and Transition
fields.description: A summary of potential outcomes and narrative hooks to lead into the next scene or adventure.
